scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in npm/*) ;; *) echo "Use npm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:workspace
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm --workspace @workspace/api-server run typecheck && npm --workspace @workspace/mockup-sandbox run typecheck
scripts.build:workspace: npm --workspace @workspace/api-server run build && npm --workspace @workspace/mockup-sandbox run build
